lessons.lessonOutcome: I can explain the value of each digit in a multi-digit number.
misconceptionsAndCommonMistakes: A digit has the same value wherever it appears.
lessons.transcriptSentences: The position of a digit determines its value. In 4,582 the digit 5 represents five hundreds.

lessons.lessonOutcome: I can use a food chain to describe how energy is transferred.
misconceptionsAndCommonMistakes: Arrows in a food chain show which organism is larger.
lessons.transcriptSentences: Arrows in a food chain show the direction of energy transfer from one organism to another.
